name: Lolab Valley
description: An oval-shaped, deeply forested, and vastly unexplored valley in Northern Kashmir. It is famous for its massive apple orchards, walnut trees, and tranquil springs.
history: The famous Kashmiri poet Allama Iqbal was so mesmerized by the beauty of this valley that he dedicated an entire poem to it.
famousFor: Untouched natural beauty, apple orchards, Kalaroos Caves.
bestTime: April to June, September to October
